message:
fix(h1): harden backpressure test spin-wait with periodic sleeps

The outgoing_body_backpressure_blocks_until_recv test used yield_now()
in a tight loop which could fail on loaded machines. Add periodic 1ms
sleeps every 100 iterations to give the OS scheduler time to run the
sender thread.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
